{"file_path":"/home/szhygulin/dev/vaultpilot-smoke-test/.claude/worktrees/agent-9173-issue-47/tests/suites/110-canaries.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
# 110-canaries.sh — exercises the canary regression-detection layer:
#   - next-batch prepends canaries from tools/canaries.json with reserved C### IDs
#   - mark-completed validates each canary transcript against expected outcomes
